examples: I had assumed him to be a Belgian.
The Belgian actor Jean Claude Van Damme has been dubbed 'Muscles from Brussels'.
Upon a negative decision, the applicant loses the protection offered by Belgian law.
Across town, in the Indira Nagar area, Toit Brewpub serves up Basmati blondes and Belgian whites.
For a rich, flavourful pint, try Wedge's Belgian Abbey Ale, a bit nutty with some caramel hints.
